title: Glass Meridian
prompt: Instrumental only. A 46-second precise, luminous electronic focus study at 108 BPM. Use a dry rounded kick, an asymmetric rim tick, a compact rubbery sub bass, glassy synthetic mallet fragments, and a cool suspended chord bed. The rhythm should feel articulate and forward but never aggressive or club-oriented. Structure: a small chromatic signal, a crisp settled groove, one clean harmonic refracted lift, then an uncluttered exit. No vocals, no lo-fi, no acoustic piano, no Rhodes, no vinyl noise, no trap hats, no EDM build-up, no festival drop, no harsh treble, no heavy wobble bass.
commercialUseNote: Verify the active ElevenLabs paid-plan music terms before commercial publication.
